expr: (async () => { const db = await import('/assets/js/store.js'); const docs = await db.all('documents'); location.href = '/invoice/?doc=' + docs[0].id; return 'navigating to ' + docs[0].id; })()

(() => ({ number: document.querySelector('[data-bind=number]').value, client: document.querySelector('[data-bind="client.name"]').value, desc: document.querySelector('.i-desc').value, qty: document.querySelector('.i-qty').value, taxMode: document.querySelector('[data-bind=taxMode]').value, previewHasClient: [...document.querySelectorAll('.pv-text')].some(e => e.textContent.includes('Globex')) }))()
